name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ)
description: A comprehensive personality questionnaire that measures behavioral style at work, assessing how a candidate fits into a role and company culture. Ideal for all levels, including leadership.

name: Verify Interactive - General Ability (GAT)
description: An interactive cognitive ability test measuring numerical, deductive, and inductive reasoning. Highly predictive of job performance for mid-level to senior roles.

name: Automated Coding Simulator (Java, Python, C++)
description: Assesses technical proficiency through real-world coding challenges. Perfect for evaluating software engineers and developers on their ability to write efficient, bug-free code.

name: Situational Judgement Test (SJT)
description: Evaluates how candidates handle workplace scenarios, testing their judgment and decision-making skills. Great for customer-facing or stakeholder-heavy roles.

name: Spoken Language Assessment
description: Automated evaluation of a candidate's spoken language proficiency, focusing on fluency, pronunciation, and vocabulary. Essential for support and global team roles.
